name: IdsEdwClmOvrdDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT CLM_OVRD.CLM_OVRD_SK, CASE WHEN CD.TRGT_CD IS NOT NULL AND LEN(dbo.trim_default(CD.TRGT_CD))>0 THEN CD.TRGT_CD ELSE 'UNK' END AS SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_OVRD.CLM_ID, CLM_OVRD.CLM_OVRD_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLM_OVRD.CLM_OVRD_EXCD_SK AS EXCD_SK, CLM_OVRD.CLM_SK, CLM_OVRD.USER_ID_SK, CLM_OVRD.OVRD_DT_SK AS CLM_OVRD_DT_SK, CLM_OVRD.OVRD_AMT, CLM_OVRD.OVRD_VAL_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_OVRD CLM_OVRD INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_EDW_ETL_DRVR DT ON CLM_OVRD.CLM_ID=DT.CLM_ID AND CLM_OVRD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=DT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON CLM_OVRD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CLM_OVRD.CLM_OVRD_SK NOT IN (0,1)), cte_na AS (SELECT 1 AS CLM_OVRD_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS CLM_ID, 'NA' AS CLM_OVRD_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS EXCD_SK, 1 AS CLM_SK, 1 AS USER_ID_SK, '1753-01-01' AS CLM_OVRD_DT_SK, 0 AS CLM_OVRD_AMT, NULL AS CLM_OVRD_VAL_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS CLM_OVRD_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS CLM_ID, 'UNK' AS CLM_OVRD_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS EXCD_SK, 0 AS CLM_SK, 0 AS USER_ID_SK, '1753-01-01' AS CLM_OVRD_DT_SK, 0 AS CLM_OVRD_AMT, NULL AS CLM_OVRD_VAL_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM cte_main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk
